facts: National Institute of Technology Durgapur is located at Mahatma Gandhi Avenue, A-Zone, Bardhaman, Durgapur, West Bengal 713209.

boys: H1 Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Hall (4th year boys)
H2 Jagadish Chandra Bose Hall (3rd year boys)
H3 Rabindranath Tagore Hall (4th year boys)
H4 CV Raman Hall (MTech 2nd year boys)
H5 Swami Vivekananda Hall (MTech 1st year boys)
H9 Satyendra Nath Bose Hall (3rd year boys)
H11 Meghnad Saha Hall (1st year boys)
H14 Dr BR Ambedkar Hall (2nd year boys)
girls: H10 Mother Teresa Hall (1st year girls)
H13 Sarojini Naidu Hall (2nd/3rd/4th year girls)
international: H12 APJ Abdul Kalam International Hall (Foreigners boys)

mess.schedule_highlights: Monday: Puri+Matar Aloo breakfast, Fish (non-veg) or Kadai Paneer (veg). Tuesday: Uttapam with Sambhar. Wednesday: Poha+Bananas breakfast, Matar Paneer/Radhabhallavi + Chicken Do Pyaza + Gulab Jamun + Cold Drink for lunch. Thursday: Bread Butter + Egg.
mess.notes: Full weekly menu available in mess menu PDF. Both veg and non-veg options available.

fee_structure.source_note: From image OCR of fee receipt, hard to read but confirmed by ambassador.

facts: Every hostel has individual WiFi with individual password and username.
NIT Durgapur uses a unique grade-point deduction system rather than a simple pass/fail threshold.
Dhobi service available at Rs 15 per cloth.

fines.late_fee: Rs 20/day for first 15 days, Rs 50/day after 15 days

facilities: One gym in girls hostel (girls only)
Second gym for both boys and girls

language_climate.climate: Winter 25/13 C, Rainy 32/25 C, Summer 37/28 C.
